title: Tiss'shar (language)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tiss'shar''' was the native language of the [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Tiss'shar]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tiss'sharl]].

The Tiss'shar language was mainly formed of hisses, shrieks, and lisping vocalizations. It had a violent-looking calligraphy of curves and sharp lines.

Most Tiss'shar were fluent in both Tiss'shar and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they tended to be only literate in their own language.

The Rebel Alliance, wanting to track the Tiss'shar [[Kal-tan-shi]], looked for an operative fluent in Yiss'shar. Unfortunately, most of them were droids, and Kal-tan-shi was a known droid-hater. They finally met their man in lieutenant [[Tole Warren]].

{{Language-stub}}
